teachings.teaching: The text emphasizes the importance of genealogical lineage, tracing descent through named figures.
It highlights the connection of Davidic kingship to subsequent generations (David → Solomon), reinforcing continuity of royal ancestry.
It records specific parental/ancestral relationships (e.g., Solomon is identified as born from the wife of Uriah), underscoring the detail-oriented nature of the genealogy.

goals.goal: To provide a genealogical record establishing familial lineage—specifically the line from David to Solomon—within a broader scriptural account.
